column53: Dear Bev I hope this email finds you well. A few years back, we had the pleasure of discussing our mentor software for children's homes with you and you weren’t ready to look at it at the time. We have made significant strides in its development, and I'm thrilled to share that it's now an award-winning solution! Our software has been meticulously crafted to cater to the unique needs of children's homes, offering unparalleled support and guidance. Here's how it can benefit you: - **Free Outbound Emailing**: Seamlessly communicate with stakeholders and partners.- **Unlimited Ongoing Ad-hoc Training**: Up to 1 hour, absolutely FREE, ensuring your team is always empowered.- **Dedicated Customer Support**: Specialists available via telephone & email from 9 - 5 pm Mon to Fri, providing assistance whenever needed.- **Data Security**: Your data is fully backed up on our AWS UK based servers, ensuring confidentiality and reliability.- **Custom Development**: Enjoy free software updates within your current version and tailor-made features for your organisation at a nominal fee.- **Comprehensive Modules**: HR, Health & Safety, Policies & Procedures, Finance, Rota, Shift Planning, Clock In/Clock Out, and System Audit—all included for FREE.- **Operations/Director Dashboards**: Gain valuable insights into your operations, provided at no extra cost.- **System Audit**: Receive 1 FREE Company Audit for enhanced efficiency and compliance. I believe that a brief 10-minute chat would be a fantastic opportunity to explore how our software could benefit your institution. We can discuss how it aligns with your objectives and how it can streamline your operations while enhancing the support you provide to the children under your care. Are you available for a quick call at your earliest convenience? I'm eager to catch up and demonstrate first-hand the value our mentor software can bring to your organisation. Looking forward to reconnecting and potentially collaborating for the betterment of those you serve. Warm regards,  Naheed DadCommercial Sales Lead07746251897www.mentorsoftware.co.uk
